finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_14.md:161; chapters/chapter_14.md:163; chapters/chapter_14.md:179; chapters/chapter_14.md:181; chapters/chapter_14.md:187; chapters/chapter_14.md:193; chapters/chapter_14.md:213; chapters/chapter_14.md:225; chapters/chapter_14.md:229
finding_results.notes: Roughened the Kai-Yusuf confrontation across all three cited spans. Yusuf's Farah explanation now trails off mid-sentence before Kai interrupts (161-163). The virus analysis delivery stumbles twice: Yusuf loses his thread at 179 ('And it's —'), Kai cuts in with a one-word prompt at 181, and Yusuf's conclusion fumbles at 187 ('I can't give you the meeting where they — I can't give you that'). The leash thesis arrives through faster, less controlled speech at 193 rather than as a prepared briefing. The prognosis delivery breaks when Yusuf stops mid-sentence at the spinal compression detail (213) and the glasses-on-off gesture replaces clinical composure at 217. Kai's moral confrontation now arrives through body (wrist and shoulder ache at 225) and gesture (pointing at monitors) rather than a three-part rhetorical escalation. His closing line at 229 is rougher and less quotable than the original. Narrator analysis trimmed at 199 and narrator thesis simplified at 211 to reduce composed interpretive work. All three required disclosures still land clearly: archive theft, Meridian-signature suspicion, and Tomas's prognosis. Birmingham register fractures Yusuf's professional exposition at three points (165, 193, 213) instead of arriving only in the prognosis.

summary: Revised the Kai-Yusuf confrontation to break the pattern of consecutive polished mini-speeches. Three major disclosures are now interrupted or verbally fumbled under pressure: Yusuf's Farah explanation trails off and gets cut by Kai, the virus analysis arrives through stumbles and restarts rather than clean briefing, and the prognosis delivery breaks twice mid-sentence. Kai's anger now arrives through body intrusion and gesture rather than composed rhetorical escalation. Yusuf's Birmingham register fractures his professional mode earlier and more often. Narrator analysis paragraphs trimmed to reduce composed thesis-work. All required information still lands. No changes to the non-dialogue scenes (Tomas's blackout, Margot's feed experience, Kai's archive discovery).
